title: Sprint O' Meter
body: # Sprint O' Meter [Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0](https://github.com/PaperScorpio/sprint-o-meter/blob/1.18.1/LICENSE) Was a participant in the dechmodcontest "A extensively customizable *~~and cursed~~* stamina system." ## Features - Adds a shiny new stamina bar under your EXP bar! - Slows you down and disables jumping when you hit 0 stamina! - Your saturation can affect how much it deducts! (can be disabled) - Prevents swimming (sprinting underwater) with 0 stamina! *(~~Swimming was too OP anyways..~~)* - Stamina regenerates slower under water! - Adds stamina related potion buffs! (can also be disabled) - *Extensively* Customizable (Accessible through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) - Ranging from *Cooldown* to *Deduction Speed* to *Decrement Amount* - ***~~Fun Cursedness!~~*** ## Dependencies And [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) ## Misc - Required on both **Client** and **Server** - I won't be porting this to Forge however, feel free to port it as long as it follows the license. - You may use this in your modpack as long as you link back to this page and give appropriate credit (just my username should be enough). - *1.16 Soon!* ##
